description: Use this API to enable or disable the simulation option setting that scans for generators for which the mechanical power differs from its electrical power by more than a specified threshold. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = set_genpwr(status, power) ierr, status,power = set_genpwr()
python_syntax: ierr = set_genpwr(status, power) ierr, status,power = set_genpwr()

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Option setting. (input; if batch command or ICODE is 0 or negative; unchanged by default) (if ICODE is positive).

parameters.name: power
parameters.description: Power unbalance threshold. (input; if batch command or ICODE is 0 or negative; unchanged by default) (if ICODE is positive).

status.description: enable scanning for generators exceeding power unbalance threshold.

error_codes.description: invalid power unbalance threshold - must be >0.0 and <10.0.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
